perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a black sweatshirt waves at the camera in a room filled with clothing and accessories. (2) Scene cuts to her walking through a bright, crowded Daiso retail store in Korea, picking up items. (3) She returns to the indoor setting and holds up a bottle of TAG skin base, then applies it to her face with a makeup sponge. (4) She displays Puffee brand makeup puffs in various packaging and swatches a product on her hand and applies it to her face. (5) She holds up multiple packages of THE BOM eyeliner pencils and demonstrates applying a light-colored pencil under her lower eyelid. (6) She displays TAG eyebrow pencils and applies one to her eyebrow. (7) She holds up Son & Park lip and cheek balm tins, swatching them on her hand and dabbing them onto her cheek. (8) She shows TAG lipsticks in rotating tubes and applies them to her lips. (9) The video ends with a shot of the Daiso store sign, her shopping basket full of products, and a flat lay of all the featured products on a table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music with a cheerful melody begins. (2) An adult female voice speaks in an excited and friendly tone, introducing the shopping haul. (3) As the visuals transition between products, the female voice continues to describe the features and benefits of each item in a steady, descriptive pace. (4) Occasional soft sound effects emphasize text overlays, while the background music remains constant and energetic throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '今天呢來介紹一下我在韓國大創挖寶到的美妝好物' (Today, let me introduce some beauty goodies I found at Daiso Korea). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '韓國大創 美妝好物' (Korea Daiso Beauty Goodies) appearing in a variety-show style bubble. (3) Product Labels: 'TAG 妝前矯正', 'PUFFEE 粉撲', 'THE BOM 眼線臥蠶筆', 'TAG 眉筆', 'Son&Park 唇頰霜', 'TAG 唇膏'. (4) Descriptive Text: '一個20塊' (20 dollars each), '推薦x3', '沒有業配!!!' (No sponsorship!!!), '霧面/水潤' (Matte/Glossy). (5) CTA: '趕快截圖下來' (Take a screenshot quickly).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> In-store shopping snippet -> Itemized product reviews and demonstrations -> Final summary and CTA.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 female shoppers seen in the background of the Daiso store shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black sweatshirt and occasional hair clips; she transitions into a beige cardigan and beanie during the store scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a room with a wooden clothing rack and various accessories. The secondary background is a brightly lit Daiso store with shelves full of stationery and cosmetics.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting indoors and standard fluorescent retail lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a beauty 'haul' and review, specifically targeting budget-conscious consumers. The creator provides a list of affordable makeup items found at Daiso Korea, demonstrating their application and effectiveness to encourage viewers to purchase these products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstrations, price mentions, and a final summary screen for screenshots.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and a summary screen specifically designed for screenshots.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'get ready with me' or 'haul' format popular on short-form video platforms, focusing on high-value, low-cost aesthetics.
